impact: Corp stats block (dashboard.html:102-115) shows "…" filler while the hx-get fetches. That's a placeholder, not a skeleton — users get three empty cards with no indication they will populate, and if the request 500s the cards stay forever-loading. Same pattern across big-battle-banner (line 16), sync-poller, and all `/alerts/*-banners` swaps in base.html (915-934). Recommended: (a) replace "…" filler with shimmer/skeleton cards that match the final shape, (b) add `hx-on:htmx:response-error` handlers that render an inline error pill with a retry link, (c) for the corp-stats specifically, render server-side placeholders with realistic field labels so the layout doesn't reflow when the swap lands. Pattern can be a Jinja2 macro `{% call skeleton_card() %}…{% endcall %}` reused across all lazy panels. Also relevant for the empty state on first-time login (no characters added yet) — no primary CTA besides the small "+ Add Character" in the header.
title: Dashboard lazy-loaded panels missing skeleton and error states
